title: Pi
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}}
{{Image}}
'''Pi''' was was used as a [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] for [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]]. [[Pi (Class-D cargo container)|''Pi'']] was a [[Class-D cargo container]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="TIE">[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]</ref> ''[[Pi 3]]'' was a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Class-A cargo container]].

==Behind the scenes==
Pi debuted in [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]. In the real world, π, spelled out as pi, is a [[Wikipedia:Pi (letter)|Greek letter]] and [[Wikipedia:Pi|mathematical constant]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
